questions.question: You bite into a sandwich and realize it's mostly bread. What do you do next?

options.text: Rearrange the fillings for maximum flavor in the next bite
Eat around the bread to find the good stuff
Accept your fate and finish the bread-heavy bite
Make a mental note to never order this again

questions.question: You step into a puddle with socks on. What's your first reaction?

options.text: Invent a new walk to avoid squishing
Immediately remove the socks, wherever you are
Pretend it didn't happen and keep going
Complain loudly to anyone nearby

questions.question: You smell something burning but can't find the source. What do you do?

options.text: Sniff around like a bloodhound
Ask everyone if they smell it too
Open a window and hope for the best
Assume it's someone else's problem

questions.question: You get an itch in the middle of your back. How do you handle it?

options.text: Contort like a pretzel to reach it
Find the nearest wall to rub against
Ask a friend for help, awkwardly
Ignore it and hope it goes away

questions.question: You take a sip of a drink and it's not what you expected. What's your move?

options.text: Make a dramatic face and announce it
Double-check the cup like it's betrayed you
Swallow and pretend it's fine
Quietly swap drinks with someone else

questions.question: You hear a weird noise at night. What do you do?

options.text: Freeze and listen like a cartoon character
Narrate your fear out loud to the darkness
Check every room with a random object as a weapon
Assume it's the house settling and go back to sleep

questions.question: You wave at someone who wasn't waving at you. What now?

options.text: Turn it into a stretch and pretend you meant it
Wave at someone else to cover it up
Laugh at yourself and move on
Pretend you were fixing your hair

questions.question: You forget someone's name mid-conversation. What do you do?

options.text: Invent a creative nickname on the spot
Ask them to spell their name for a fake reason
Avoid using their name entirely
Hope someone else says it soon

questions.question: You say goodbye, then walk in the same direction. What's your move?

options.text: Make a joke about it and keep walking
Pretend to get a phone call and stop
Walk faster to escape the situation
Stare at your shoes until it's over

questions.question: You laugh at a story you didn't hear. What do you do next?

options.text: Ask for a dramatic reenactment
Laugh even harder to sell it
Nod and hope for context clues
Quietly fade into the background

questions.question: You accidentally reply-all to a company email. What now?

options.text: Send a meme as damage control
Own it with a follow-up joke
Blame autocorrect in a second email
Pretend it never happened

questions.question: You walk into a glass door. What's your recovery plan?

options.text: Bow and take a theatrical exit
Check if anyone saw, then laugh
Blame the door for being too clean
Quickly walk away and never return

questions.question: You find $5 on the ground. What do you do?

options.text: Buy a snack and share it with a friend
Leave it for someone who needs it more
Pocket it and move on
Try to find the owner, but give up quickly

questions.question: You see a sad dog in the rain. What do you do?

options.text: Sing it a song about sunshine
Try to cheer it up with silly faces
Offer your umbrella, even if it doesn't help
Take a photo and post about it

questions.question: You get a text that just says 'K.' How do you feel?

options.text: Overthink it for the next hour
Send a meme in response
Assume they're mad and apologize
Ignore it and move on

questions.question: You accidentally break something sentimental. What do you do?

options.text: Hold a tiny funeral for it
Try to glue it back together, badly
Hide the evidence and hope no one notices
Blame gravity

questions.question: You see someone crying in public. What do you do?

options.text: Offer them a snack from your bag
Sit nearby in silent solidarity
Pretend to tie your shoe until they leave
Send them good vibes from afar

questions.question: You get invited to a party but don't know anyone. What's your plan?

options.text: Find the pet and hang out with it all night
Make up a fun alter ego for the evening
Stick to the snack table
Leave early and blame traffic

questions.question: You hear your old favorite song in public. What do you do?

options.text: Sing along, choreography included
Text a friend who also loved it
Smile and hum quietly
Shazam it just to be sure

questions.question: You find an old toy from childhood. What happens next?

options.text: Give it a dramatic backstory
Take a selfie with it
Try to make it work again
Put it back and walk away

questions.question: You see a commercial from your childhood. What do you do?

options.text: Recite the jingle word-for-word
Feel a wave of nostalgia and text someone
Look up the product to see if it still exists
Ignore it and keep scrolling

questions.question: You find a note you wrote to yourself years ago. What do you do?

options.text: Write a reply and hide it for future you
Laugh at your old handwriting
Try to remember what you were thinking
Throw it away without reading

questions.question: You see a playground you used to visit. What do you do?

options.text: Test the swings, age be damned
Take a photo for the memories
Tell someone a story about it
Walk by and pretend not to care

questions.question: You find a box of old photos. What do you do?

options.text: Narrate each photo like a documentary
Send the funniest one to a friend
Try to recreate one of the photos
Put the box back and forget about it

questions.question: You see a squirrel eating pizza. What do you do?

options.text: Narrate its life as a pizza chef
Take a video and add dramatic music
Try to make eye contact and nod respectfully
Keep walking like it's normal

questions.question: You wake up with spaghetti in your hair. What do you do?

options.text: Invent a new breakfast trend
Blame your dreams in a social post
Try to remember last night's dinner
Just wash it out and move on

questions.question: You see someone walking a pet lizard in a sweater. What do you do?

options.text: Compliment the lizard's fashion sense
Ask if the lizard picked the outfit
Take a selfie with the lizard
Pretend it's totally normal

questions.question: You sneeze and accidentally meow instead. What now?

options.text: Act like nothing happened and keep meowing
Blame it on a nearby cat
Apologize to everyone in the room
Leave the room in silence

questions.question: You get a text from a number labeled 'Your Future Self.' What do you do?

options.text: Reply with a dad joke
Ask for lottery numbers
Send a meme as a test
Block the number immediately

questions.question: You find a potato shaped exactly like a heart. What do you do?

options.text: Declare it your soulmate
Give it a name and backstory
Take a photo and share it
Eat it without a second thought
